ops.title: Sync .env files across hosts (key-level merge)
ops.description: Sync untracked root-level `.env*` files across the host mesh as per-key LWW maps (cregistry), stamped by file mtime, merged newest-wins with propagating deletions. Sidecar state under `~/.config/reposync/env/`; new `env.get_state` rpc method on rpc-serve; env pass appended to reconcile.Reconcile (fetches ALL peers including the notifying origin); watch on individual .env file paths with a values-only digest folded into the fingerprint; `NoEnvSync` per-repo opt-out (`repo add --no-env-sync`). Full design: plan file repoosync-should-alos-sync-stateless-dream.md (session plan) — key invariant I1: a persisted sidecar's present-key set equals the file's KV content at persist time.

ops.text: go test ./... green including new internal/env unit suite and reconcile integration tests (two-host convergence, origin-peer-fetched pin)
env edits on one host land merged on peers via reconcile; key deletions propagate; same-key conflicts resolve newest-wins
repo add --no-env-sync opt-out respected end to end; git-tracked .env files never observed or overwritten
README + CHANGELOG document scope, parse limitations, opt-out, sidecar location, mixed-version rollout note
